ApplySeparation.Description: When set to false, NPCs wont try to avoid each other or player.

WanderRadius.Description: General wander radius for idle wander.

ViewRange.Description: The range from which the target will be seen.

ViewSector.Description: The view sector within which the target needs to be to be seen.

HearingRange.Description: The range from which the target will be heard.

AbsoluteDetectionRange.Description: The range at which a target is guaranteed to be detected.

AlertedRange.Description: A range within which the player can be seen/sensed when the NPC is alerted.

AlertedTime.Description: How long to wait in an alerted state before switching to active combat.

RunThreshold.Description: Relative speed at which run animation should be used.

WakingPeriod.Description: The hour range this NPC is awake for.

LeashDistance.Description: The range after which an NPC will start to want to return to their spawn point.

LeashMinPlayerDistance.Description: The minimum distance from the player before the NPC will be willing to give up on the chase.

LeashTimer.Description: How long the NPC must be too far before giving up.

HardLeashDistance.Description: An absolute maximum from the leash position.

LeapAttack.Description: The medium leap attack to use at closer mid-range.

FarLeapAttack.Description: The stronger leap attack to use when target is far away.

LeapDistance.Description: Distance at which the boss will leap instead of running.

AttackDistance.Description: The distance at which an NPC will execute attacks.

DesiredAttackDistanceRange.Description: The distance within which the NPC wants to be from its target while attacking.

AttackPauseRange.Description: The minimum time before an NPC can execute a second attack.

CombatRelativeTurnSpeed.Description: Modifier that decides turn speed difference in combat.

CombatBehaviorDistance.Description: The distance within which to switch from smart chasing to combat-oriented movement.

CombatDirectWeight.Description: Weight for the direct combat movement behavior.

CombatStrafeWeight.Description: Weight for the combat strafing movement behavior.

CombatAttackPreDelay.Description: The time delay range before the NPC performs an attack.

CombatAttackPostDelay.Description: The time delay range after the NPC performs an attack.

CombatBackOffAfterAttack.Description: Whether to back off after performing an attack.

CombatBackOffDistanceRange.Description: How far to back off after performing an attack.

CombatBackOffDurationRange.Description: How long to back off for after performing an attack.

BlockAbility.Description: The interaction to use for blocking.

BlockProbability.Description: The probability this NPC will block.

ChaseRelativeSpeed.Description: Relative chasing speed when pursuing a target.

CombatMovingRelativeSpeed.Description: Relative speed to use during combat movement.

CombatBackwardsRelativeSpeed.Description: Relative speed when backing away from target.

DisableDamageGroups.Description: Groups not to take damage from.

InvestigateRange.Description: Range within which an NPC is willing to investigate.

ConfusedTimeRange.Description: How long the NPC should act confused.

SearchTimeRange.Description: How long the NPC should search for lost target.

TargetSwitchTimer.Description: Minimum time locked onto a single target.

TargetRange.Description: Distance the target needs to be within to maintain priority.

IsMemory.Description: Defines if the NPC is a memory.

MemoriesCategory.Description: Defines the category of the memory.

NameTranslationKey.Description: Translation key for NPC name display

SummonKind.Description: The NPC role to summon in combat.

SummonCountRange.Description: How many minions to summon per summon cycle.

SummonCountRangePhase2.Description: How many minions to summon per summon cycle in phase 2 (<=50% HP).

SummonStartupCountRange.Description: How many minions to summon once at combat start.

SummonDistanceRange.Description: Distance range used for spawn positions.

SummonDelayRange.Description: Delay range before each spawned minion appears.

SummonCooldownRange.Description: Timer range between summon casts while in phase 1 (>50% HP).

SummonCooldownRangePhase2.Description: Timer range between summon casts while in phase 2 (<=50% HP).

SummonStartupDelayRange.Description: Delay before the guaranteed combat-start summon fires.

SummonCastTimeRange.Description: How long the boss channels summon while stationary.

SummonAnimation.Description: Status animation to play while summoning.

StateTransitions.$Comment: Always clear target and reset instructions when going back to idle.
Always equip main weapon when going to combat or alerted.
Always clear animation when moving from Alerted state.

Instructions.$Comment: === IDLE STATE: Stay stationary, detect nearby players ===
Enter combat if taking damage.
Check if there are any potential threats nearby.
Boss stays stationary when idle - no wandering.
=== ALERTED STATE: Boss noticed a player ===
If target is in range, go to combat.
Lost sight of the target.
=== COMBAT STATE: The main boss fight logic ===
Initialize summon cooldowns for both phases once whenever combat logic starts.
Guaranteed summon shortly after combat starts.
Send combat beacon and spawn one zombie immediately when entering combat.
Escape combat if no hostile target can be detected and none remembered (e.g. all targets are ghost/dead).
Chase substate: target is too far, run to them.
When target is in attack distance, go back to default combat.
FAR LEAP: use stronger leap when target is 5+ blocks away.
NEAR-MID LEAP: use medium leap at ~3-5 blocks.
Return home if too far from spawn.
Chase the target.
Phase 1 summon logic (>50% HP).

Sensors.$Comment: No active summoned allies left around boss (boss is not flock leader).
Boss has taken significant overall damage.
Target is far before leap range.

Instructions.$Comment: Phase 2 summon logic (<=50% HP), faster cadence.

Sensors.$Comment: No active summoned allies left around boss (boss is not flock leader).
Boss has taken significant overall damage.
Target is far before leap range.

Instructions.$Comment: Retreat behavior if needed.
Track damage sources for target switching.
Target swapping.
FAR LEAP in default combat: use stronger leap for 5+ blocks.
NEAR-MID LEAP in default combat: use medium leap for ~3-5 blocks.
Attack when target is within range.
If target can't be reached (height difference or nav issues), wait.
Leash check during combat.
Back off behavior after attacking.
If blocked and in range, try chasing again.
Execute combat-oriented movement (strafe, direct, charge).
Strafe around the target while fighting.
Attack the target directly.
Always charge at the target while attacking.
If no other combat behavior matched, chase.
=== RETURN HOME STATE: Boss returns to spawn point ===
Re-enter combat if attacked while returning.
Go back to idle once home.
=== SEARCH STATE: Boss lost target, search area ===
Re-enter combat if attacked.
Act confused briefly.
Prowl: search the area then return to idle.
